summary: Get QR code for an email address' profile
description: Returns a QR code for an email address by the given SHA256 hash.

parameters.name: sha256_hash
parameters.description: The SHA256 hash of the email address or profile URL slug.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the QR code.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the QR code.

parameters.name: utm_medium
parameters.description: The medium of the UTM parameters. Appended to the URL in the QR code.

parameters.name: utm_campaign
parameters.description: The campaign of the UTM parameters. Appended to the URL in the QR code.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of center icon to display ('user' for avatar, 'gravatar' for logo, 'none' for no icon).
